security.csp: default-src 'self' blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; frame-ancestors 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Multi-agent AI desktop client with local-first privacy
bundle.longDescription: Zileo Chat is a multi-agent desktop application that lets you orchestrate AI conversations with Mistral, Ollama, and OpenAI-compatible providers. Connect to external tools via MCP servers. All data stays local — you validate each step.
